isolation.testCommand: cd "/Users/codex/Downloads/Code Files/pi-rtk" && bun run test -- grep 2>&1

assertions.title: grep groups by file - Results grouped by file, max 5 per file, max 20 files

steps.observed: All 26 tests passed including 3 tests directly verifying VAL-TOOL-017

steps.action: Verify test 'groups results by file (VAL-TOOL-017)' passes
steps.expected: Output contains file headers (src/foo.ts:, src/bar.ts:) and summary
steps.observed: Test passed — assertions verify file grouping headers and summary line

steps.action: Verify test 'caps at 5 matches per file with overflow indicator (VAL-TOOL-017)' passes
steps.expected: Only 5 match lines shown per file, overflow indicator present
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts matchLines.length === 5 and '... 7 more matches' present

steps.action: Verify test 'caps at 20 files with overflow indicator (VAL-TOOL-017)' passes
steps.expected: Max 20 files shown, overflow indicator for remaining files
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts '... 10 more files' present and summary shows all 30 files

tests: grep filter — happy path > groups results by file (VAL-TOOL-017)
grep filter — max 5 per file > caps at 5 matches per file with overflow indicator (VAL-TOOL-017)
grep filter — max 20 files > caps at 20 files with overflow indicator (VAL-TOOL-017)
grep filter — combined > groups, caps, deduplicates, and summarizes in one pass
grep filter — edge cases > handles large output (>500 lines)

assertions.title: grep match count summary - Output ends with {N} matches in {N} files

steps.observed: All 26 tests passed including 2 tests directly verifying VAL-TOOL-018

steps.action: Verify test 'appends N matches in N files' passes
steps.expected: Filtered output contains '4 matches in 3 files'
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts summary line with correct plural counts

steps.action: Verify test 'uses singular for 1 match in 1 file' passes
steps.expected: Filtered output contains '1 match in 1 file' (singular)
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts singular form for single match/file

tests: grep filter — summary (VAL-TOOL-018) > appends N matches in N files
grep filter — summary (VAL-TOOL-018) > uses singular for 1 match in 1 file
grep filter — happy path > groups results by file (VAL-TOOL-017)
grep filter — happy path > achieves >60% savings on typical output
grep filter — max 20 files > caps at 20 files with overflow indicator (VAL-TOOL-017)
grep filter — edge cases > handles large output (>500 lines)
grep filter — combined > groups, caps, deduplicates, and summarizes in one pass

assertions.title: grep deduplicates identical lines - Duplicate match lines collapsed

steps.observed: All 26 tests passed including 2 tests directly verifying VAL-TOOL-019

steps.action: Verify test 'deduplicates identical match lines across files' passes
steps.expected: Identical import lines collapsed to ≤1 occurrence, unique lines preserved, total count correct
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts importLines.length ≤ 1, 'const foo = 42' present, '4 matches in 4 files' in summary

steps.action: Verify test 'shows dedup count for collapsed lines' passes
steps.expected: Dedup count shown for collapsed identical lines (e.g. '3 files' or 'x3')
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts output matches /3 files|seen in 3|x3|\(3\)/i

tests: grep filter — dedup (VAL-TOOL-019) > deduplicates identical match lines across files
grep filter — dedup (VAL-TOOL-019) > shows dedup count for collapsed lines
grep filter — combined > groups, caps, deduplicates, and summarizes in one pass

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. All 26 grep filter tests pass (vitest, 6ms total test time). VAL-TOOL-017 verified by 3 direct tests (file grouping, 5-per-file cap, 20-file cap) plus 2 integration tests. VAL-TOOL-018 verified by 2 direct tests (plural and singular summary forms) plus 5 tests that also assert summary lines. VAL-TOOL-019 verified by 2 direct tests (dedup collapse and dedup count display) plus 1 combined integration test.
